title: Amendment of sections prepared by the Institute
doc_html:
§255.  Amendment of sections prepared by the Institute

Any section in any subsequent edition or supplement of the Louisiana Revised Statutes, prepared by the Institute may be amended or repealed by reference to the section number, without reference to the legislative act from which the section was taken.
doc_text:
§255.  Amendment of sections prepared by the Institute
Any section in any subsequent edition or supplement of the Louisiana Revised Statutes, prepared by the Institute may be amended or repealed by reference to the section number, without reference to the legislative act from which the section was taken.
